sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Dash
special_mechanics.description: Characters can dash back and forth by pressing L and R buttons respectively

special_mechanics.name: Split-Screen Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: When fighters move far apart in the playfield, view splits to keep both combatants visible while positioning maintained via on-screen radar

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources contain gameplay overview and development information but no documented movement physics parameters, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system details. As a 1993 SNES fighting game, specific movement physics were not publicly documented.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Dragon Ball Z: Super Butōden
